scripts.build: mkdir -p _vercel_out && cp *.html _vercel_out/ && cp *.css _vercel_out/ && cp -r assets fonts demos preview ui_kits img _vercel_out/ && cp _redirects vercel.json og.png apple-touch-icon.png favicon-32.png icon-192.png icon-512.png robots.txt sitemap.xml site.webmanifest _vercel_out/ && rm -f _vercel_out/email-templates.html && cd admin && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p _vercel_out/admin && cp -r admin/dist/* _vercel_out/admin/
